title: Illegal Items Datapack
body:
# Illegal Items Datapack 
## Description:
This datapack provides useful (or useless) items for Minecraft gameplay.

## Features and Additions:

### Levitation Potion: Grants Levitation 50 for 2 seconds. (Splash Potion)
### Small Nuke: (Summons an explosion at the location your choice with the explosion radius of 5)
### Nuke: (Summons an explosion at the location of your choice with the explosion radius of 10)
### Knockback Slimeball: Provides Knockback X effect.
### Light M-Gun (Crossbow) (for Minecraft)
### Hell Potion (Wither and Regeneration 
### Lightning

## Link to recipes:
https://docs.google.com/document/d/14QLFDgb88l5WRhxyMnuOJtLFJ_dGUFVh4U3bpmIb8cM/

## Why Download?

Experience a new level of excitement and creativity with these illegal items. Unleash chaos and destruction with the Nukes (just spawn eggs, no retextures). Experiment with unique gameplay strategies using the Knockback Slimeball.
Surprise and challenge your friends on compatible servers.

## Version
This datapack was made on June 25th, 2023 on 1.20.1. Datapack is on its first release, v0.1

## Installation Instructions:
To install the datapack, simply create a world and open it's saves folder>datapacks and drag its .zip file in there.

## Important Notes:

This datapack is designed for personal use or private servers where all participants consent to the use of illegal items. Ensure that you have the necessary permissions to use such items on any server you intend to join. Please respect the terms of service and guidelines of Minecraft and the specific server you're playing on. 

Made by daggieyt / DAGGieGitHub
